site.name: Space Heard Us
site.tagline: Every Voice Deserves to Be Heard
site.description: An inclusive youth nonprofit band in Fairfax, VA, celebrating the gifts of children with disabilities through the power of music.

home.heroTitle: Every Voice Deserves to Be Heard
home.heroSubtitle: Courtney leads Space Heard Us, an inclusive youth nonprofit band in Fairfax, VA. Together with Eric and Kaden — musicians with autism — they perform for churches, hospitals, daycares, and communities across Northern Virginia.
home.missionText: To spread hope through music with a group that includes children with and without autism — celebrating every voice, serving our community, and showing the world what kids with disabilities can do.
home.volunteerText: Join our team and help us bring inclusive music to more families, hospitals, and communities across Northern Virginia.
home.contactText: Questions about performances, volunteering, or how to get involved? We'd love to hear from you.
